name: Anadama Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 cups all-purpose flour (white or whole wheat, half and half works well)
recipeInstructions:
1. Allow the cornmeal to cool down.
2. Combine the cornmeal, sugar, salt, and yeast in a large bowl.
3. Gradually add in the flour until you achieve a kneadable consistency.
4. Knead the dough with your hands until it is smooth and elastic.
5. Form the dough into two loaves and let rise until doubled in size.
6. Shape each loaf and let rise again in greased pans until doubled in size.
7. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
8. Bake for 45 minutes, reducing heat to 350°F (180°C) after the first 20 minutes.
